title: Morbier Frittata with Fiery Flair
description: A spicy twist on a classic French-Italian breakfast dish, featuring a rich morbier cheese and a kick from fiery peppers.
instructions: In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add diced fiery peppers and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt.
Add sliced morbier cheese to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the peppers in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Slice into wedges and serve hot.
